scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,WEB" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.seed: cd backend && DATABASE_URL='file:./prisma/dev.db' npx tsx prisma/seed.ts
scripts.vercel:build: (cd frontend && rm -rf node_modules && npm install && npm run build) && (cd backend && rm -rf node_modules && npm install && npx prisma generate)
scripts.render:build: npm install --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run prisma:generate --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.render:start: cd backend && mkdir -p uploads && npx prisma migrate deploy && NODE_ENV=production node dist/src/server.js
